tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsGlobalHubsCreate

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsGlobalHubsList
tools.description: Lists the Network Connectivity Center hubs associated with a given project.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsInternalRangesCreate

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsInternalRangesList

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsList

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesCreate
tools.description: Creates a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesGet
tools.description: Gets details about a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesList
tools.description: Lists the Network Connectivity Center spokes in a specified project and location.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesPatch
tools.description: Updates the parameters of a Network Connectivity Center spoke.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.networkconnectivityProjectsLocationsSpokesTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
